evals.prompt: I want to add a webhook notification system so that when a user completes an order, we fire a POST to their configured endpoint. Can you create a proposal for this?
evals.expected_output: Creates a change proposal under prompter/changes/add-webhook-notifications/ with proposal.md, tasks.md, and at least one spec delta under specs/ with ADDED Requirements and Scenario blocks. Runs prompter validate with --strict.

assertions.name: Creates proposal.md with Why section
assertions.description: Output or created files include a proposal.md that contains a ## Why section explaining the motivation

assertions.name: Creates tasks.md
assertions.description: Output or created files include a tasks.md with a checklist of implementation tasks using - [ ] format

assertions.name: Creates spec delta with ADDED Requirements
assertions.description: A spec delta file under specs/ contains '## ADDED Requirements' header

assertions.name: Spec delta has Scenario block
assertions.description: The spec delta contains at least one '#### Scenario:' block (4 hashtags, not bold or bullet)

assertions.name: Does not write implementation code
assertions.description: The output does not contain actual code implementation (no function definitions, no API endpoint implementations) — only design documents

assertions.name: Mentions running prompter validate
assertions.description: The output mentions running prompter validate with --strict flag to verify the proposal

evals.prompt: The add-webhook-notifications proposal has been approved. Please implement it now.
evals.expected_output: Reads the proposal.md, design.md (if any), and tasks.md from the change directory. Works through tasks sequentially. Updates tasks.md with checkmarks when done.

assertions.name: Reads proposal.md before implementing
assertions.description: Output explicitly mentions reading or referencing proposal.md before starting implementation

assertions.name: Reads tasks.md
assertions.description: Output explicitly mentions reading or referencing tasks.md

assertions.name: Works through tasks sequentially
assertions.description: Output describes completing tasks in order, not all at once or in arbitrary order

assertions.name: Updates task checklist
assertions.description: Output mentions updating tasks.md checkboxes (- [x]) after completion

assertions.name: Does not skip approval gate
assertions.description: Output does not implement before acknowledging the proposal was approved — respects the approval gate

evals.prompt: We shipped the webhook feature last week. Can you archive that change?
evals.expected_output: Runs prompter list to identify the change, confirms the ID with the user or uses it directly, runs prompter archive <id> --yes, then validates with prompter validate --strict.

assertions.name: Mentions running prompter list to identify change
assertions.description: Output mentions running `prompter list` or `prompter show` to verify the change ID before archiving

assertions.name: Uses correct archive command with --yes
assertions.description: Output includes `prompter archive add-webhook-notifications --yes` (or similar with the correct change ID and --yes flag)

assertions.name: Runs post-archive validation
assertions.description: Output mentions running `prompter validate --strict` after archiving to confirm specs are consistent

assertions.name: Does not archive blindly without ID check
assertions.description: Output shows the agent verifying or confirming the change ID rather than immediately running the archive command
